# Tara Home

Tara is a preconfigured smart home kit and home automation kit for existing homes, listings, and move-in-ready upgrades.

## Core Offering

- Preconfigured smart home starter kit
- Local PC hub
- Connect robot vacuums, smart lawn mowers, smart TVs, speakers, and other smart devices
- Presence detection sensors
- Smart doorbell
- Door sensors
- Window sensors
- Smart lights
- Smart thermostat
- Phone app
- Optional exterior camera kit for safety
- No required monthly subscription for core kit routines

## How Ordering Works

The buyer enters counts for windows, exterior doors, rooms, smart lights, thermostats, doorbells, presence zones, and optional camera zones. Tara configures the kit for that home before shipping. The buyer mounts the devices and downloads the app.

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://tarahome.ai/
- Library: https://tarahome.ai/blog
- Privacy: https://tarahome.ai/privacy/
